## CONTRIBUTING checklist

- [ ] Lesson `id` is unique across `js/data.js`
- [ ] `story` step is the first step of any new lesson
- [ ] All quiz items have `explanation` strings
- [ ] No external dependencies added
- [ ] Commit message format: `type(scope): description`
